author: ghyls
body:
#### PR description:
Backport of #50889.

This backport is being opened so that the changes introduced by #50889 can be included in the MPI-related tests on the Run 3 HLT setup.

#### PR validation:
Unit tests pass
title: [17_0_X] Prevent the MPI modules from throwing upon race conditions or hanging at the end of a run
